name: canshare-who-thymus-primary-histology
title: NZ WHO thymus primary histology
description: Histologies used for thymus primaries (from WHO Classification of Tumours, Thoracic Tumours, latest edition, including sections 5. Mesenchymal tumours of the thorax, 6. Tumours of the thymus, 7. Germ cell tumours of the mediastinum and 9. Ectopic tumours of thyroid and parathyroid origin) or an 'Other' value.

filter.value: (^299511000210105 |New Zealand WHO classification of tumours (5th edition) thoracic mesenchymal tumour of thorax histology reference set| OR ^299451000210105 |New Zealand WHO classification of tumours (5th edition) thoracic thymus histology reference set| OR ^299521000210100 |New Zealand WHO classification of tumours (5th edition) thoracic germ cell tumours of mediastinum histology reference set| OR ^299541000210106 |New Zealand WHO classification of tumours (5th edition) thoracic ectopic tumour of thyroid and/or parathyroid origin histology reference set| OR 74964007 |Other| OR 1186968006 |Malignant adenomatous neoplasm (morphologic abnormality)|) MINUS 1187332001 |Adenocarcinoma (morphologic abnormality)|
